source_text: Hello, how can I help you?
reference: Halo, ada yang bisa saya bantu?
alt_references: Halo, apa yang bisa saya bantu?

source_text: Thank you for your patience.
reference: Terima kasih atas kesabaran Anda.

source_text: Our office is closed on weekends.
reference: Kantor kami tutup pada akhir pekan.
alt_references: Kantor kami tutup di akhir pekan.

source_text: Please confirm your attendance by Friday.
reference: Mohon konfirmasi kehadiran Anda paling lambat hari Jumat.

source_text: The meeting is scheduled for tomorrow at 10am.
reference: Rapat dijadwalkan besok pukul 10 pagi.

source_text: Could you please send me the latest version of the document?
reference: Tolong kirimkan saya versi terbaru dari dokumen tersebut.

source_text: We appreciate your business and look forward to serving you again.
reference: Kami menghargai kerja sama Anda dan berharap dapat melayani Anda kembali.

source_text: Although the project was challenging, the team delivered excellent results on time and within budget.
reference: Meskipun proyeknya menantang, tim memberikan hasil yang sangat baik tepat waktu dan sesuai anggaran.

source_text: If you have any questions or concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out to our support team at any time.
reference: Jika Anda memiliki pertanyaan atau keluhan, jangan ragu untuk menghubungi tim dukungan kami kapan saja.

source_text: Selamat pagi, semoga harimu menyenangkan.
reference: Good morning, have a nice day.
alt_references: Good morning, hope you have a pleasant day.

source_text: Your policy premium is due next week.
reference: Premi polis Anda jatuh tempo minggu depan.

source_text: Please submit your claim within 30 days of the incident.
reference: Mohon ajukan klaim Anda dalam 30 hari setelah kejadian.
alt_references: Mohon ajukan klaim Anda dalam waktu 30 hari sejak kejadian.

source_text: Your insurance policy covers medical expenses up to fifty thousand dollars.
reference: Polis asuransi Anda menanggung biaya medis hingga lima puluh ribu dolar.

source_text: We need additional documents to process your claim.
reference: Kami memerlukan dokumen tambahan untuk memproses klaim Anda.

source_text: The premium for this policy is calculated based on your risk profile and coverage selections.
reference: Premi untuk polis ini dihitung berdasarkan profil risiko dan pilihan perlindungan Anda.

source_text: Your claim has been approved.
reference: Klaim Anda telah disetujui.

source_text: This policy provides comprehensive coverage including third-party liability, theft, and natural disasters.
reference: Polis ini memberikan perlindungan menyeluruh termasuk tanggung jawab pihak ketiga, pencurian, dan bencana alam.

source_text: I'm sorry for the delay in processing your claim.
reference: Saya mohon maaf atas keterlambatan dalam memproses klaim Anda.

source_text: Sorry, your premium payment has been declined by your bank.
reference: Mohon maaf, pembayaran premi Anda ditolak oleh bank Anda.

source_text: Sorry to hear about your loss. We will help you with the claim process.
reference: Mohon maaf mendengar kerugian Anda. Kami akan membantu Anda dengan proses klaim.

source_text: I apologize for the inconvenience. Your policy will be updated shortly and you will receive a confirmation email.
reference: Mohon maaf atas ketidaknyamanan ini. Polis Anda akan segera diperbarui dan Anda akan menerima email konfirmasi.

source_text: Sorry for any confusion. Let me clarify the claim procedure for you step by step.
reference: Mohon maaf atas kebingungannya. Izinkan saya menjelaskan prosedur klaim untuk Anda langkah demi langkah.

source_text: Hello, how can I help you?
reference: Hai, bagaimana saya boleh bantu anda?
alt_references: Helo, bagaimana saya boleh membantu anda?

source_text: Thank you for your patience.
reference: Terima kasih atas kesabaran anda.

source_text: Hello, how are you today?
reference: こんにちは、今日はいかがお過ごしですか？
alt_references: こんにちは、お元気ですか？

source_text: Thank you for your patience.
reference: お待ちいただきありがとうございます。

source_text: Hello, how can I help you?
reference: 您好，请问有什么可以帮您？
alt_references: 你好，请问有什么需要帮助的？

source_text: Thank you for your patience.
reference: 感谢您的耐心。
